compliance.assurance_rationale: ASD Essential Eight E8.06 Patch operating systems — dependency-vulnerability alerting is the primary operational evidence for patching software dependencies under the E8 patching strategy.
EU CRA Art.14 Reporting of actively exploited vulnerabilities — dependency-vulnerability alerting is the detection pipeline that feeds CRA 24-hour reporting duty.
EU CRA Art.13 Obligations of manufacturers — dependency alerts evidence the manufacturer obligation to handle vulnerabilities during the support period.
PSD2 Art.95 Management of operational and security risks — continuous dependency vulnerability tracking is an operational-risk input supervisors expect.
